title: heliosperma pusillum subsp. albanicum
intro: Heliosperma pusillum subsp. albanicum, also known as the Albanian rock jasmine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its small white flowers and delicate foliage. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Albanian medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Heliosperma pusillum subsp. albanicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers can be used as a natural dye.
